SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

Class BrineMixingScaleEvaluator.MixPoint

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.BrineMixingScaleEvaluator.MixPoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
BrineMixingScaleEvaluator
public static class BrineMixingScaleEvaluator.MixPoint extends Object implements Serializable
Result of the mineral saturation at one mixing fraction.

  • Constructor Details

    • MixPoint

      public MixPoint(double fractionA, double caco3SI, double baso4SI, double caso4SI, double srso4SI)
      Creates a mixing-fraction result point.
      Parameters:
      fractionA - fraction of brine A in the mixture (0 to 1)
      caco3SI - CaCO3 saturation index
      baso4SI - BaSO4 saturation index
      caso4SI - CaSO4 saturation index
      srso4SI - SrSO4 saturation index

  • Method Details

    • getFractionA

      public double getFractionA()
      Gets the fraction of brine A at this point.
      Returns:
      fraction of brine A (0 to 1)

      Gets the CaCO3 saturation index.

      Returns:

    • getSrSO4SI

      Gets the SrSO4 saturation index.
      Returns:
